# JobsByCulture

> Culture-first job search for AI & tech professionals. Browse 1,463+ jobs filtered by culture values like async-first, work-life balance, remote-friendly, and ethical AI.

## About

JobsByCulture helps professionals find jobs at companies whose culture actually matches how they like to work. Instead of generic job boards, we tag every role with real culture data from employee reviews.

## Key Pages

- [Browse Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/jobs): 1,463+ AI & tech jobs filtered by 18 culture values, 12 role categories, and 8 locations
- [Compare Cultures](https://jobsbyculture.com/compare): Side-by-side company culture comparison tool
- [Company Directory](https://jobsbyculture.com/directory): All 19 profiled companies with ratings, values, and reviews

## Company Profiles

- [Anthropic](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/anthropic): 4.4 Glassdoor, AI Safety, 95% recommend
- [Hugging Face](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/huggingface): 3.8 Glassdoor, Open Source, 78% recommend
- [Databricks](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/databricks): 4.1 Glassdoor, Data Infrastructure, 82% recommend

- [Perplexity AI](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/perplexity): 4.7 Glassdoor, AI Search, 92% recommend
- [Together AI](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/together): 4.1 Glassdoor, Open Source AI, 82% recommend

- [Scale AI](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/scale): 3.5 Glassdoor, AI Data Infrastructure, 56% recommend
- [CoreWeave](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/coreweave): 3.6 Glassdoor, GPU Cloud, 62% recommend

- [Stripe vs Shopify](https://jobsbyculture.com/compare/stripe-vs-shopify)
- [NVIDIA vs AMD](https://jobsbyculture.com/compare/nvidia-vs-amd)

## Culture Values We Track

1. Work-Life Balance
2. Remote-Friendly
3. Flexible Hours
4. Async-First
5. Deep Work / Low Meetings
6. Transparent Culture
7. Flat Hierarchy
8. Diverse & Inclusive
9. Safe to Fail
10. Engineering-Driven
11. Ship Fast & Iterate
12. Open Source Culture
13. Learning & Growth
14. Strong Comp & Equity
15. Direct Product Impact
16. Wears Many Hats
17. Ethical AI / Safety
18. Mission-Driven

## Data Sources

Company culture ratings are sourced from Glassdoor employee reviews, public company culture documents, and verified employee feedback. AI-generated analysis uses Anthropic Claude for companies not yet profiled.
